comment: Single source of truth for the query-embedding model pin, shared by lib/embed-query.ts (runtime) and scripts/download-model.mjs (build-time bundling). modelId/dims MUST stay in lockstep with the pipeline's fastembed model (BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5, 384-dim, migration 0033) — Xenova/* is the same weights converted to ONNX for transformers.js. revision is the HF repo commit sha so builds are reproducible and the runtime can never silently pick up re-uploaded weights that drift from the stored document vectors. dtype q8 selects the ~34MB int8-quantized variant (spike-verified: cosine 0.9974 parity with the fastembed fp32 vectors).
